changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Add passwd column to module_user_account for password hash

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Copy existing password hashes from legacy user_account table
changeSet.sql: UPDATE module_user_account m SET passwd = u.passwd FROM user_account u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id AND u.passwd IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Update sync trigger to include passwd column in module_user_account → user_account sync
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_user_account_to_user_account() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO user_account ( user_id, user_name, first_name, last_name, email, phone, institutional_affiliation, user_type_id, status_id, active_study, enabled, account_non_locked, passwd, date_created, date_updated, owner_id, update_id ) VALUES ( NEW.user_id, NEW.user_name, NEW.first_name, NEW.last_name, NEW.email, NEW.phone, NEW.institutional_affiliation, NEW.user_type_id, NEW.status_id, NEW.active_study_id, NEW.enabled, NEW.account_non_locked, NEW.passwd, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.owner_id, NEW.update_id ); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE user_account SET user_name = NEW.user_name, first_name = NEW.first_name, last_name = NEW.last_name, email = NEW.email, phone = NEW.phone, institutional_affiliation = NEW.institutional_affiliation, user_type_id = NEW.user_type_id, status_id = NEW.status_id, active_study = NEW.active_study_id, enabled = NEW.enabled, account_non_locked = NEW.account_non_locked, passwd = NEW.passwd, date_created = NEW.date_created, date_updated = NEW.date_updated, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, update_id = NEW.update_id WHERE user_id = OLD.user_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM user_account WHERE user_id = OLD.user_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
changeSet.rollback: -- Restore original sync trigger without passwd column CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_user_account_to_user_account() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO user_account ( user_id, user_name, first_name, last_name, email, phone, institutional_affiliation, user_type_id, status_id, active_study, enabled, account_non_locked, date_created, date_updated, owner_id, update_id ) VALUES ( NEW.user_id, NEW.user_name, NEW.first_name, NEW.last_name, NEW.email, NEW.phone, NEW.institutional_affiliation, NEW.user_type_id, NEW.status_id, NEW.active_study_id, NEW.enabled, NEW.account_non_locked, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.owner_id, NEW.update_id ); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE user_account SET user_name = NEW.user_name, first_name = NEW.first_name, last_name = NEW.last_name, email = NEW.email, phone = NEW.phone, institutional_affiliation = NEW.institutional_affiliation, user_type_id = NEW.user_type_id, status_id = NEW.status_id, active_study = NEW.active_study_id, enabled = NEW.enabled, account_non_locked = NEW.account_non_locked, date_created = NEW.date_created, date_updated = NEW.date_updated, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, update_id = NEW.update_id WHERE user_id = OLD.user_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM user_account WHERE user_id = OLD.user_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
